release_notes: V14.44 build 217 beta adds recorded carbohydrate totals for today, today and yesterday insulin/carbohydrate summaries, and a timestamped two-day IOB AND COB history under the Insulin activity Web UI. It also adds a selectable Carbs total today main-screen widget and a new COB and IOB TFT screen showing today/yesterday totals and recent treatment rows. Current IOB and COB remain separately labelled from recorded daily insulin and carbohydrate totals. All Build 216 insulin summary, Build 215 Web UI/trend/sensor improvements, Build 214 leah.local default, Build 212 native OTA safeguards and existing Nightscout, SAGE, alarm and WhatsApp functions are preserved.
